methods.description: Process for developing a detailed age model for the Chiba composite section, including the M-B boundary, using ultra-high-resolution δ18O stratigraphy and correlation with sea level curves.

steps.description: Establish ultra-high-resolution δ18O stratigraphy using benthic foraminiferal species Bolivinita quadrilatera and Cibicides aknerianus from ~10-50 cm intervals.
steps.searchable_summary: collect δ18O stratigraphy data from benthic foraminifera

steps.description: Combine stratigraphy data with lower resolution data from previous studies.
steps.searchable_summary: integrate stratigraphy data with existing datasets
inputs: lower resolution data from Suganuma et al. (2015)

steps.description: Correlate the δ18O benthic record with the sea level curve of Elderfield et al. (2012).
steps.searchable_summary: correlate δ18O record with sea level curve

steps.description: Estimate age model uncertainty based on chronologic uncertainty of the LR04 stack.
Assign MIS 19 substages using climatic variables proposed by Nomade et al. (2019).
steps.searchable_summary: assign MIS 19 substages based on climatic variables

steps.description: Estimate astronomical ages for each MIS and substage boundary based on the full δ18O benthic dataset.
steps.searchable_summary: estimate astronomical ages for MIS boundaries

methods.description: Integration of δ18O stratigraphy from the CHOSHI-1 core to supplement the age model for the Chiba composite section.

steps.description: Collect δ18O stratigraphy data for the CHOSHI-1 core covering MIS 24 to MIS 11.
steps.searchable_summary: collect δ18O stratigraphy data from CHOSHI-1 core

steps.description: Compare δ18O record of the CHOSHI-1 core with the Chiba composite section.
steps.searchable_summary: compare δ18O records between CHOSHI-1 core and Chiba section

steps.description: Identify common tephra beds in both sections to facilitate comparison.
steps.searchable_summary: identify common tephra beds for comparison
inputs: tephra bed data from both sections
